mnemonics.title: Happened-Before Rules (LMT)
mnemonics.content: **L**ocal order -> **M**essage passing -> **T**ransitivity. The rules build upon each other logically.

mnemonics.title: Lamport vs. Vector Clock Inference
mnemonics.content: **L**amport is a **L**iability for causality (L(e)<L(f) doesn't prove e→f). **V**ector is **V**alid for causality (V(e)<V(f) proves e→f).

mnemonics.title: Global State Consistency Check
mnemonics.content: **N**o **R**eceipt without a **S**end. If a Received message is in a state, its Send must also be in that state for it to be consistent.
